chronicles_leveling.screen.skills.title: Skills
chronicles_leveling.screen.levels.title: Levels
chronicles_leveling.tooltip.levels.descr: Spend XP to level up your character.
Each level grants you one point to spend on stats.
chronicles_leveling.tooltip.level_up.for: Spend %1$s Levels (%2$s experience) to level up
Spend 1 Level (%1$s experience) to level up
chronicles_leveling.tooltip.level_up.ins: Not enough experience to level up.
chronicles_leveling.tooltip.points.descr: Points available to spend on Stats
chronicles_leveling.tooltip.stat.no_poin: No points available! Level up your character first
chronicles_leveling.attributes.diminishi: • Multiple sources do not stack additively
attribute.minecraft.armor_toughness.desc: Improves armor effectiveness against strong attacks.
attribute.minecraft.attack_damage.desc: Amount of damage dealt by each melee attack.
attribute.minecraft.attack_knockback.des: How far back targets are knocked back by melee hits.
attribute.minecraft.attack_speed.desc: Number of times per second you can make a full-power attack.
attribute.minecraft.block_break_speed.de: Increases how quickly blocks are broken.
attribute.minecraft.block_interaction_ra: How many blocks away you can use or break blocks from.
attribute.minecraft.burning_time.desc: Duration of time spent on fire when ignited.
attribute.minecraft.camera_distance.desc: Distance the third-person camera sits behind the player.
attribute.minecraft.entity_interaction_r: How many blocks away you can interact with or attack entities from.
attribute.minecraft.flying_speed.desc: Movement speed while flying (creative or elytra).
attribute.minecraft.follow_range.desc: Distance at which mobs detect and follow targets.
attribute.minecraft.gravity.desc: The strength of gravity acting on you.
attribute.minecraft.jump_strength.desc: Affects how high you can jump.
attribute.minecraft.knockback_resistance: How resistant you are to knockback from incoming hits.
attribute.minecraft.luck.desc: Increases luck, affecting fishing and some loot from chests.
attribute.minecraft.mining_efficiency.de: Improves block-mining speed when using the correct tool.
Improves movement over slowing surfaces like soul sand.
attribute.minecraft.oxygen_bonus.desc: Additional time you can breathe underwater.
attribute.minecraft.safe_fall_distance.d: Fall distance survived without taking damage.
attribute.minecraft.spawn_reinforcements: Chance for zombies to summon allies when hurt.
attribute.minecraft.step_height.desc: Maximum height you can step up automatically.
attribute.minecraft.sweeping_damage_rati: Fraction of damage dealt to nearby mobs by sweep attacks.
attribute.minecraft.tempt_range.desc: Distance at which mobs are tempted by held food or items.
attribute.minecraft.waypoint_transmit_ra: Distance at which you broadcast your location to waypoints.
attribute.minecraft.waypoint_receive_ran: Distance at which you receive waypoint signals.
chronicles_leveling.skill.weaponry.desc: Trained by dealing melee damage to mobs.
chronicles_leveling.skill.archery.desc: Trained by striking mobs with arrows and other projectiles.
chronicles_leveling.skill.magic.desc: Trained by dealing magic damage to mobs.
chronicles_leveling.skill.defense.desc: Trained by taking hits in combat.
chronicles_leveling.skill.acrobatics.des: Trained by jumping and surviving falls.
chronicles_leveling.skill.alchemy.desc: Trained by brewing potions at a brewing stand.
chronicles_leveling.skill.mining.desc: Trained by breaking stone and ore.
chronicles_leveling.skill.speech.desc: Trained by trading with merchants and taming mobs.
chronicles_leveling.skill.herbalism.desc: Trained by tilling soil, planting seeds, and harvesting.
chronicles_leveling.skill.enchanting.des: Trained by using enchanting tables, anvils, and grindstones.
chronicles_leveling.skill.smithing.desc: Trained by crafting tools, weapons, and armor.
chronicles_leveling.skill.fishing.desc: Trained by reeling in catches with a fishing rod.
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.slashi: Deal an additional +%1$s damage with slashing weapons (swords and axes)
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.rend.d: Slashing hits have a %1$s chance to apply a stacking bleed, dealing %2$s damage per second plus %3$s per extra stack, for %4$s.
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.quick_: Consecutive slashing hits build a flurry, +%1$s attack speed per stack (up to %2$s stacks); decays if you stop hitting.
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.ripost: %1$s chance to auto-counter a melee hit you take, striking back for your own attack damage.
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.pierci: Deal an additional +%1$s damage with piercing weapons (tridents and spears).
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.armor_: Ignore %1$s of the target's armor when you hit them.
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.skewer: Piercing melee hits knock the target back, away from you.
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.execut: +%1$s melee damage against targets below %2$s health.
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.blunt_: Deal an additional +%1$s damage with blunt weapons (maces).
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.sunder: Blunt hits stack an armor-shred debuff, reducing armor by %1$s per stack (up to %2$s stacks).
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.concus: Blunt hits drain the target's stamina and stagger them with slowness for %1$s.
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.heavy_: Blunt hits deal bonus damage equal to %1$s of your own max health.
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.bloodt: Gain lifesteal on melee hits, healing you for %1$s of the damage you deal.
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.moment: Consecutive melee hits on the same target ramp damage by %1$s per stack, stacking up to %2$s times; resets if you break the streak.
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.seismi: Active: slam the ground, dealing %1$s damage and %3$s of Slowness to all enemies within %2$s blocks.
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.master: Active: for %1$s, every melee hit lands as a critical strike. A hit that would already have critted also deals %2$s of its damage as true damage, ignoring armor and resistances.
chronicles_leveling.perk.weaponry.adapti: You have mastered every weapon class. Your slashing, piercing, and blunt damage bonuses and their on-hit effects apply with any melee weapon in hand.
chronicles_leveling.perk.archery.strong_: +%1$s arrow velocity for a flatter arc and harder-hitting shots.
chronicles_leveling.perk.archery.quick_h: +%1$s draw speed for faster bow draws and crossbow reloads.
chronicles_leveling.perk.archery.far_sho: Ranged hits deal up to +%1$s damage, scaling with how far the arrow traveled before striking.
chronicles_leveling.perk.archery.multish: Fire +%1$s extra arrows in a spread; extras can't be picked up for ammo.
chronicles_leveling.perk.archery.bullsey: +%1$s ranged crit chance and +%2$s ranged crit damage.
chronicles_leveling.perk.archery.marksma: +%1$s accuracy, tightening arrow spread and reducing arrow drop.
chronicles_leveling.perk.archery.ricoche: On hit, the arrow bounces to a nearby target, chaining up to %1$s times for reduced damage.
chronicles_leveling.perk.archery.piercin: Arrows pass through enemies, hitting every mob in a line instead of stopping at the first.
chronicles_leveling.perk.archery.disorie: %1$s chance a ranged hit afflicts the target with blindness and nausea for %2$s.
chronicles_leveling.perk.archery.pinning: %1$s chance a ranged hit pins the target, rooting them with slowness for %2$s.
chronicles_leveling.perk.archery.arrow_r: Fired arrows become recoverable so you can pick them back up after the shot.
chronicles_leveling.perk.defense.magic_w: Wards against the arcane for +%1$s magic defense.
chronicles_leveling.perk.defense.pain_to: Lowers the most any single hit can remove by %1$s of your max health (anti-one-shot).
chronicles_leveling.perk.defense.last_st: Dropping below %1$s health grants absorption and damage reduction for %2$s (on a cooldown).
chronicles_leveling.perk.defense.stalwar: Makes you immune to knockback and movement-slowing effects while blocking or sneaking.
chronicles_leveling.perk.defense.shield_: Widens your block arc to %1$s° and gives a %2$s chance, when you block a melee hit, to bash the attacker: stunning and knocking them back.
chronicles_leveling.perk.defense.retribu: Reflects %1$s of melee damage you take back at the attacker (thorns).
chronicles_leveling.perk.defense.bulwark: Active: arms a brief parry that fully negates the next incoming hit from any direction, no shield required.
chronicles_leveling.perk.mining.vein_sen: Mine faster as your skill grows: +%1$s break speed per mining level, currently granting +%2$s.
chronicles_leveling.perk.mining.mother_l: %1$s chance for an ore to drop a full extra yield of its raw resources.
chronicles_leveling.perk.mining.smelters: Active: for %1$s, ores you mine drop their furnace-smelted result instead of raw ore.
chronicles_leveling.perk.mining.fortunat: Ore drops roll with +%1$s effective Fortune even when your tool has no Fortune enchant.
chronicles_leveling.perk.mining.gem_hunt: Gives a %1$s chance for a bonus drop when mining diamond- or emerald-tier ores.
chronicles_leveling.perk.mining.spelunke: Active: for %1$s, sense nearby ores through solid walls, highlighting them so you can spot them before digging.
chronicles_leveling.perk.mining.cave_eye: Your eyes adjust to the dark, granting a faint, always-on night vision so caves and shadows never go pitch-black.
chronicles_leveling.perk.mining.sturdy_t: Your mining tools take %1$s less durability damage from breaking blocks.
chronicles_leveling.perk.mining.superbre: Active: for %1$s, break any pickaxe-mineable block instantly.
chronicles_leveling.perk.herbalism.auto_: Harvesting a mature crop replants it where it can survive, spending one of its seeds from your inventory.
chronicles_leveling.perk.herbalism.green: After you plant a crop, a %1$s chance (equal to your Herbalism level) to instantly grow it forward %2$s stage(s).
chronicles_leveling.perk.herbalism.culti: %1$s chance that harvesting a mature crop drops an extra full yield.
chronicles_leveling.perk.herbalism.rupee: %1$s chance breaking grass, leaves, or other foliage yields a valuable.
chronicles_leveling.perk.herbalism.mycol: You can place mushrooms anywhere, regardless of light level
You can place mushrooms anywhere, and grow mushrooms & fungi with bone meal regardless of light level
You can place and grow mushrooms & fungi anywhere; bonemealing a mushroom spreads mycelium over nearby dirt, and breaking a fungal block may drop extra mushrooms
chronicles_leveling.perk.herbalism.toxin: %1$s chance a harvested crop or foliage also yields an alchemy reagent.
chronicles_leveling.perk.herbalism.garde: Food you craft or cook gains %1$s.
chronicles_leveling.perk.herbalism.bount: Active: grow every crop within %1$s blocks to full, harvest it, and replant it.
chronicles_leveling.perk.acrobatics.feat: Adds +%1$s safe-fall distance, cushioning bigger drops before they hurt.
chronicles_leveling.perk.acrobatics.roll: When you land while looking straight down, reduce the fall damage by %1$s.
chronicles_leveling.perk.acrobatics.spri: Boosts jump strength by %1$s and raises step height by %2$s blocks so you clear ledges automatically.
chronicles_leveling.perk.acrobatics.mome: A sprint-jump grants a brief burst of movement speed for %1$s on takeoff.
chronicles_leveling.perk.acrobatics.sure: Removes the movement slowdown while using, eating, or drawing items, so you keep full speed.
chronicles_leveling.perk.acrobatics.dash: Active: lunge forward in your look direction, granting invulnerability for %1$s.
chronicles_leveling.perk.acrobatics.dodg: Adds +%1$s evasion, raising your chance to evade incoming melee hits.
chronicles_leveling.perk.acrobatics.catl: Increases sneaking speed by %1$s and reduces the range at which mobs detect you by %2$s while sneaking.
chronicles_leveling.perk.alchemy.experim: Active: while holding a glass bottle, water bottle, or awkward potion, distill an elixir of %1$s random beneficial effect(s)
chronicles_leveling.perk.alchemy.catalys: Your brews complete %1$s faster and consume %2$s less blaze fuel.
chronicles_leveling.perk.alchemy.deft_ha: You no longer have a cooldown between using potions, and you throw them three times as far.
chronicles_leveling.perk.alchemy.lingeri: Potions you brew (and your Experimental/Volatile Elixirs) last %1$s longer.
chronicles_leveling.perk.alchemy.iron_st: Negative effects you receive have %1$s reduced duration.
chronicles_leveling.perk.alchemy.master_: +%1$s chance for a finished brew or elixir to yield an extra potion.
chronicles_leveling.perk.alchemy.school_: Each potion or elixir you brew has a chance equal to your Alchemy level (as a percent) to gain +1 amplifier on its beneficial effects; also grants up to +20% skill XP.
chronicles_leveling.perk.alchemy.alchemi: Active: drink the potion in your hand to discharge its effects to all nearby allies (you included) as a burst aura.
chronicles_leveling.perk.alchemy.restora: Beneficial effects on your brews and elixirs always gain +1 amplifier, stacking with the School of Restoration chance.
chronicles_leveling.perk.alchemy.school_: Each potion or elixir you brew has a chance equal to your Alchemy level (as a percent) to gain +1 amplifier on its harmful effects; also grants up to +20% skill XP. Active: distill a Volatile Elixir, a splash potion of random harmful effects, from a held brewing reagent.
chronicles_leveling.perk.alchemy.empower: Splash and lingering potions you throw have %1$s larger radius.
chronicles_leveling.perk.alchemy.toxicol: Killing an enemy afflicted by a negative effect spreads its effects to 2 nearby enemies.
chronicles_leveling.perk.alchemy.negatio: Harmful effects on your brews and elixirs always gain +1 amplifier, stacking with the School of Negation chance; your Volatile Elixirs become lingering potions.
Villagers sell to you for %1$s fewer emeralds and buy from you for %1$s more emeralds.
chronicles_leveling.perk.speech.reputati: Villagers you trade with restock faster and lock their trades more slowly.
chronicles_leveling.perk.speech.master_n: Grants %1$s bonus villager trading XP so villagers level up and unlock higher tiers faster.
chronicles_leveling.perk.speech.silver_t: %1$s chance a completed trade doesn't consume the villager's offer stock.
chronicles_leveling.perk.speech.enchante: Gear and books you buy from villagers roll %1$s extra enchantment(s).
chronicles_leveling.perk.speech.power_br: Enchantments on gear and books you buy from villagers are %1$s level(s) stronger. A one-level enchantment like Mending is unaffected.
chronicles_leveling.perk.speech.wanderin: Wandering traders show up near you more often.
chronicles_leveling.perk.speech.beast_wh: Active: instantly tame the tameable animal you are looking at.
chronicles_leveling.perk.speech.husbandr: Animals you breed recover from breeding %1$s faster.
chronicles_leveling.perk.speech.pack_lea: Your tamed pets take %1$s less damage.
chronicles_leveling.perk.speech.kindred_: For each pet you own standing near you, you and your pets deal %1$s more damage.
chronicles_leveling.perk.speech.pacify.d: Active: hostile mobs within %1$s blocks drop their target and cannot attack for %2$s. Radius and duration grow with rank.
chronicles_leveling.perk.enchanting.prod: Reach high-tier enchants at a lower level and spend %1$s fewer levels per enchant; the rolled enchant is unchanged.
chronicles_leveling.perk.enchanting.arca: You can see %1$s more enchant(s) that will be applied to an item before you enchant it.
chronicles_leveling.perk.enchanting.esot: Lets the enchanting table roll treasure enchantments, curses excluded.
chronicles_leveling.perk.enchanting.unst: Each rolled enchantment has a chance equal to your Enchanting level to gain +1 level, potentially past its max level.
chronicles_leveling.perk.enchanting.unli: Every rolled enchantment gains +1 level, potentially past its max; stacks with Unstable Power.
chronicles_leveling.perk.enchanting.esse: For each enchantment on your gear, regenerate +%1$s %2$s per second.
chronicles_leveling.perk.enchanting.wiza: The enchanting table you use most glows for you; items enchanted there gain a permanent +10% to their base stats.
chronicles_leveling.perk.enchanting.tran: Put a book in a grindstone to copy %1$s of an item's enchantments onto it, %2$s the item in the process.
chronicles_leveling.perk.enchanting.expe: Stack normally-exclusive enchantments of the same kind (all damage on a weapon, all protection on armor) %1$s.
chronicles_leveling.perk.enchanting.esse: Active: drain some of your XP to repair %1$s, as if using Mending.
chronicles_leveling.perk.enchanting.abun: Adds a chance to roll up to %1$s additional enchantments onto items when enchanting.
chronicles_leveling.perk.enchanting.expe: at the anvil and the enchanting table
chronicles_leveling.perk.fishing.patient: Fish bite %1$s faster, and your lure reaches %2$s blocks farther to draw them in sooner.
chronicles_leveling.perk.fishing.fortune: Grants +%1$s luck and a %2$s chance to surface a bonus treasure-tier catch.
chronicles_leveling.perk.fishing.big_cat: %1$s chance to reel in a second copy of a caught item.
chronicles_leveling.perk.fishing.enchant: %1$s chance a caught item comes pre-enchanted.
chronicles_leveling.perk.fishing.fishers: Your caught fish come out cooked, restoring more hunger and never raw.
chronicles_leveling.perk.fishing.harpoon: Grants +%1$s ranged damage, and a trident you throw reels the mob it strikes toward you.
chronicles_leveling.perk.fishing.trident: Grants +%1$s arrow velocity, and your Loyalty tridents return %2$s faster.
chronicles_leveling.perk.fishing.frostbr: Your bobber melts the ice it lands on, so you can fish over frozen water.
chronicles_leveling.skill.tree.respec.co: Click again to confirm the reset
chronicles_leveling.skill.tree.slot.need:
Action-bar slot %1$s
Bind its key in Controls
chronicles_leveling.skill.tree.slot.unbo:
Unbound
Right-click to assign an action-bar slot
chronicles_leveling.skill.tree.slot.repl:
Slot %1$s held by %2$s
Press Enter to replace
chronicles_leveling.ability.error.reagen: Hold a glass bottle, water bottle, or awkward potion
chronicles_leveling.ability.error.no_pot: Hold a potion with active effects
chronicles_leveling.ability.error.using_: Can't do that while using an item
chronicles_leveling.command.points.set: Set unspent points to %2$s for %1$s player(s)
chronicles_leveling.command.points.add: Adjusted unspent points by %2$s for %1$s player(s)
chronicles_leveling.command.skill.reset_: Reset all skill perks for %1$s player(s)
chronicles_leveling.command.cooldowns.re: Reset all ability cooldowns for %1$s player(s)
item.chronicles_leveling.lesser_orb_of_r: Right-click to reset one stat and refund its points.
item.chronicles_leveling.greater_orb_of_: Right-click to reset every stat and refund all points.
Use twice within 5 seconds to confirm.
Resetting all stats will grant you %1$s points. Use again to confirm.
item.chronicles_leveling.tome.tooltip.li: Grants 1 character level and 1 stat point.
Resetting %1$s will grant you %2$s stat points.
